plugin.name: High-End Auto-Tuned (Recommended)
plugin.description: For X3D or modern hybrid CPUs, 32-64+ GB RAM, and fast NVMe storage. Larger adaptive budgets, strided archive prefetch, RAM reserve protection, and background-core placement.

plugin.name: Balanced
plugin.description: Lower cache budgets and a longer startup delay for broader hardware compatibility.

plugin.name: Do not bundle runtime (Recommended)
plugin.description: The page-cache optimization does not require DirectStorage. Use this unless another mod already supplies the runtime or you are testing the experimental raw-read path.

plugin.name: Install DirectStorage 1.3 runtime
plugin.description: Installs Microsoft's redistributable beside the SKSE plugin. The runtime is validated at startup, but the raw-read backend remains disabled until bDirectStorageWarmRead=1.
